differential_diagnoses: Primary angiitis of the central nervous system
next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid for autoimmune encephalitis panel (including LGI1, NMDA, AMPA, GABAb)
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy (paraneoplastic workup)
Send serum for paraneoplastic antibody panel
Initiate empiric high-dose intravenous corticosteroid therapy for suspected inflammatory/autoimmune process
Perform repeat brain MRI with contrast to monitor for changes in enhancement patterns
Consider brain biopsy if clinical status declines despite immunomodulatory therapy

differential_diagnoses: Hashimoto encephalopathy (steroid-responsive encephalopathy associated with autoimmune thyroiditis)
Primary angiitis of the central nervous system
next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid for comprehensive autoimmune/paraneoplastic encephalitis panel (including LGI1, GABAb, AMPA, NMDA, anti-Hu, anti-Ma2)
Perform CSF RT-QuIC and 14-3-3 protein testing for CJD
Obtain thyroid peroxidase (TPO) antibodies and repeat thyroid panel
Initiate empiric high-dose intravenous methylprednisolone pulse therapy for suspected inflammatory encephalopathy
Perform whole-body PET/CT to evaluate for occult paraneoplastic malignancy
Review and perform repeat neuropsychological evaluation to characterize cognitive profile
